prompt: Perform month-end closing for March 2026. Post accrual reversal (9200 NOK per month from account 1720 to expense). Record monthly depreciation for a fixed asset with acquisition cost 275800 NOK and useful life 3 years (straight-line depreciation to account 6030). Verify that the trial balance is zero. Also post a salary accrual (debit salary expense account 5000, credit accrued salary account 2900).
